startBlockedBy: This repository cannot prove an explicit human decision to begin real note-taking.
Manual checklist boxes must be completed outside generated scaffolding before write mode is used.

manualChecklistItems.label: A human reviewer is identified and ready to record real notes.
manualChecklistItems.evidence: No generated artifact can prove this.
manualChecklistItems.manualAction: Write reviewer identity outside this generated checklist before creating the overlay.

manualChecklistItems.label: The reviewer confirms the scope is only rewrite_batch_01 and rewrite_batch_05.
manualChecklistItems.evidence: rewrite_batch_01, rewrite_batch_05 are the current target batches.
manualChecklistItems.manualAction: Do not expand scope during first real note-taking.

manualChecklistItems.label: The reviewer has read the 5 direct-candidate source rows and will confirm or downgrade them before sourceFitNotes.
manualChecklistItems.evidence: 5 candidates and 8 source refs are queued.
manualChecklistItems.manualAction: Resolve source roles before filling sourceFitNotes.

manualChecklistItems.label: The reviewer confirms all 72 required note fields start blank.
manualChecklistItems.manualAction: Do not paste generated examples into real notes.

manualChecklistItems.label: The reviewer understands safe examples are sample-only guidance.
manualChecklistItems.evidence: 4 safe examples and 5 rejected categories are available.
manualChecklistItems.manualAction: Use examples as style guidance only, not as real review evidence.

manualChecklistItems.label: The reviewer accepts education-only and non-production boundaries.
manualChecklistItems.evidence: All checked artifacts keep approvalStatus:not_approved, learnerFacingRelease:false, and productionReady:false.
manualChecklistItems.manualAction: Stop if any note suggests advice, signal, performance, broker/order, automation, or real-money guidance.

manualChecklistItems.label: The reviewer intentionally chooses whether to run the write initializer.
manualChecklistItems.evidence: Preview command is npm.cmd run init:first-reviewer-status-overlay:dry-run; write command is npm.cmd run init:first-reviewer-status-overlay:write.
manualChecklistItems.manualAction: Run write mode only after all manual boxes are checked.

postWriteValidationCommand: npm.cmd run check:lesson-batch-completion && npm.cmd run check:reviewer-note-quality-lint && npm.cmd run check:curriculum-review
stopConditions: Stop if docs/LESSON_BATCH_REVIEW_STATUS.json already exists; preserve existing notes before any force path.
Stop if a human reviewer is not explicitly ready to record real notes.
Stop if direct candidates have not been reviewed for confirm-or-downgrade source fit.
Stop if any generated sample note is copied into the real overlay as evidence.
Stop if any note proposes advice, signals, broker/order workflow, automation, performance, or real-money guidance.
Stop if yellow, red, or research_only sources are proposed as learner-facing evidence.
boundary: This checklist is a manual pre-start gate only. It does not create docs/LESSON_BATCH_REVIEW_STATUS.json, fill human notes, approve lessons, publish learner-facing content, change lesson grades, certify commercial readiness, provide trading advice, imply performance, connect brokers, automate trading, or guide real-money decisions.
